title: Allow having different username and groupname
body:
Previously assuming that groupname equals username

Which isn't always true, e.g. boot2podman's `tc:staff`

@afbjorklund, thanks for the fix!

LGTM, but I'd like another head nod.

Oh. Oops.
LGTM, but I'd like a once-over from @giuseppe

this is used for the lookup in `/etc/subuid` and `/etc/subgid` files, where the key is always the user name.

So the previous version is the correct one, we need to look up the username, not the group.
